response.text:
I removed the duplicate measurement.

What I did:
- Sent `MEASUrement:DELete "MEAS2"`
- Captured a fresh screenshot to verify

What I see now:
- Only one measurement tile remains on the right:
  - Meas 1: Frequency
  - μ: 7.855 MHz
- The duplicate Meas 2 tile is gone
- CH1 yellow waveform is still displayed
- Scope still shows:
  - 500 mV/div on CH1
  - 100 ns/div horizontal scale
  - Acquisition: Single

So yes — it now has just one frequency measurement.
